action_text: Type "Incidents by Assigned to" into the reports list search field
rationale: The current filter returned no results. A more accurate out-of-box report name is “Incidents by Assigned to”; updating the list search to this exact title is likely to find the correct report.

action_text: Press Enter in the reports list search field to run the search
rationale: After updating the search term, we need to execute the list search to refresh results and locate the report.

action_text: Type "Incident by Assigned to" into the reports list search field
rationale: If the exact title differs slightly, a close variant “Incident by Assigned to” may match existing report naming and surface the needed report.

action_text: Type "Assigned to" into the reports list search field
rationale: Using a broader keyword increases chances of finding related reports that show counts by assignee; we can then pick the correct one.

action_text: Click the "Group" tab in the Reports list
rationale: If the report is not Global but shared within a group, switching to the Group tab can reveal it.
